summary: Konekt B2B Platform Critical Stabilization Pass - All features tested and working. StandardDrawerShell with React Portal, Team Performance pages, Promotions wiring fix, Affiliate form cleanup, CRM width containment, and Content Studio hierarchy refinement verified.

issues: Console warnings about duplicate React keys - minor code quality issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Content Studio has duplicate key warnings in console - consider adding unique keys to mapped elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Critical Stabilization Pass features verified. Admin auth uses localStorage key 'konekt_admin_token'. Team Performance pages at /admin/team/overview, /admin/team/leaderboard, /admin/team/alerts all working with real data from /api/admin/team-performance/summary endpoint.

details: Drawer renders with React Portal at document.body level
Full-viewport height with overlay covering sidebar
Backdrop with blur effect (z-index 9998)
Panel with sticky header and footer (z-index 9999)
Scrollable body content
Tested on: Affiliates (New Affiliate), CRM (lead detail), Promotions Manager (New Promotion)
Page loads at /admin/team/overview
6 KPI cards: Total Revenue, Deals Closed, Active Leads, Conversion Rate, Avg Rating, Overdue Follow-Ups
9-column performance table: Rep, Leads, Quotes, Deals Won, Revenue, Conv %, Rating, Overdue, Status
Status badges: Top Performer, Strong, Improving, Needs Attention
Real data from /api/admin/team-performance/summary endpoint
Page loads at /admin/team/leaderboard
Top 3 podium cards with rank badges (1, 2, 3)
Full ranking table with Score column
Weighted scoring formula working (deals 30%, commission 30%, rating 25%, revenue 15%)

Alert table with columns: Sev, Type, Message, Owner/Rep, Date
Severity icons (critical=red, warning=amber)
Filter tabs: All, Overdue Follow-Up
28 critical alerts displayed
platform_promotion_engine.py queries canonical 'promotions' collection
All products show has_promotion=false (all promotions inactive)
Promotions Manager shows 2 promotions, 0 active
Creation form shows identity fields only: Name, Email, Code, Notes, Active
NO Commission Type/Value selects in form
Commission Policy shown as read-only from Settings (10% per closed deal)
Reference to Settings Hub for changing defaults
CRM page contained to max-w-7xl
Smaller heading text (text-xl)
Not stretching edge-to-edge
4 templates: Product Focus, Promo Focus, Service Focus, Minimal Brand
4 themes: Light, Dark, Promo, Minimal
2 formats: Square, Vertical
Minimal layout shows larger logo and image area
WYSIWYG preview with Download, Save Draft, Publish buttons
/api/admin/team-performance/summary returns kpis, reps, alerts
KPIs: total_revenue, deals_closed, active_leads, conversion_rate, avg_rating, overdue_followups
Reps: ranked by weighted score with labels
Alerts: sorted by severity (critical first)
